.github/workflows/.purpose: verify workflow dispatch stays aligned with local CI wrappers

.gitignore.purpose: verify ignored artifacts do not hide source files

.gitlab-ci.yml.purpose: verify GitLab dispatch stays aligned with local CI wrappers

.env.example.purpose: verify the environment template stays parseable

Cargo.lock.purpose: verify dependency lock stays in sync

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify the package manifest stays parseable

README.md.purpose: verify the repo README stays in sync

agent/.purpose: verify the Jankurai metadata bundle stays clean

.jankurai/.purpose: verify Jankurai score history and evidence stay refreshed by the audit lane

docs/testing.md.purpose: verify testing, repair receipt, and launch-gate evidence stays audit-clean

ops/.purpose: verify CI wrappers and hooks stay runnable

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify the Rust toolchain pin stays parseable

scripts/.purpose: verify local CI helper scripts parse

tools/.purpose: verify ported jailgun tool scripts parse

src/.purpose: verify the crate body and unit tests stay green

crates/domain/.purpose: verify the domain error surface stays compiled

crates/domain/AGENTS.md.purpose: verify domain repair guidance stays paired with tests

crates/domain/Cargo.toml.purpose: verify domain crate manifest stays compiled

crates/.purpose: verify all workspace crates including the ported jailgun crates stay green

crates/jailgun-core/.purpose: verify jailgun core models, config, receipts, and browser registry stay green

crates/jailgun-deploy/.purpose: verify deploy orchestration and cleanup policy stay green

crates/jailgun-orchestrator/.purpose: verify bridge coordination and run event flow stay green

crates/jailgun-cli/.purpose: verify the jailgun and jailhard CLIs stay green

apps/.purpose: verify ported jailgun node apps stay green

apps/dashboard/.purpose: verify the dashboard renders and websocket flows stay green

contracts/.purpose: verify contract drift checks and contract skeletons stay visible

contracts/json-schema/event.schema.json.purpose: verify the generated event schema stays in sync with the Rust event source

contracts/fixtures/events/.purpose: verify generated event fixtures stay in sync with the schema

config/.purpose: verify the jailgun config example stays loadable by jailgun-core

prompts/examples/.purpose: verify example prompts stay routed and contain no real task bodies

test-fixtures/.purpose: verify the test configuration fixture stays loadable

package.json.purpose: verify the node workspace manifest stays installable and typechecks

package-lock.json.purpose: verify the node dependency lock stays in sync

tsconfig.base.json.purpose: verify the shared TypeScript config stays valid

db/.purpose: verify database skeletons stay visible to the audit
